creator: jontheil@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alexander Leidinger from comment #8)
I tried to deinstall openjdk11. After that, there were some warnings, but the application did start correctly. I had to reinstall openjdk11 as a dependence for another port. Now all the problems are gone. This is for my amd64 system. I have another one with arm64 architecture. On this system, I can't get a fresh install to start properly. It throws all sorts of warnings and errors at me. If I try to access the webgui, the error shown is "No services found".
Maybe the problems on arm64 are much different so I should file another bug? As said, the issues with the amd64 version were solved (although the source of the issues is not clear to me). Thanks for helping me.
